last_cycle_summary: Completed a sixth bounded Export/Audit cycle. Re-read V1 planning docs, all V1 status JSON, git status, shared V1 contracts, backend/API scoping, gate-engine, review-studio, document-retrieval, LLM runtime, supervisor readiness, current Export/Audit status, and relevant export/audit code. Added source-index manifest referential-integrity validation for chunk-to-document, source-link-to-document, and source-link-to-chunk references, and wired source-index manifest validation into export package integrity so orphaned source provenance fails closed. The focused export package test now covers the valid local-only warning path and a deliberately orphaned source-index failure. Gate Engine semantics, final export fail-closed behavior, and no-Supabase/no-external-provider claims remain unchanged.

source_index_consumer_adapter.evidence: buildExportPackage and buildAuditPack now accept options.sourceIndex with schema_version, storage_driver, matter_id, generated_at, documents, chunks, source_links, and limitations.

source_index_export_caller.evidence: RemoteMatterCommandCenter passes the typed local V1 source index into buildExportPackage, includes source_index_manifest in the preview payload, and shows local-only/Supabase-unavailable status text next to the audit export package.

audit_pack_source_manifest.evidence: buildV1SourceIndexManifest produces aletheia-v1-source-index-manifest-v1 with document/chunk/source-link counts, deterministic hashes, document status counts, validation items, explicit local-only limitations, and this cycle's referential-integrity checks for chunk/document/source-link IDs.

final_vs_draft_export_guard.evidence: buildExportAuthorization uses existing canExportFinal semantics. Draft intent returns warning when final gates are not ready; final intent returns blocked until the export gate passes and no gate is failed. AuditPack includes export_authorization and ExportPackage.manifest includes final_export_allowed.

command_center_authorization_visibility.evidence: RemoteMatterCommandCenter preview payload now includes export_authorization, the export panel shows final export allowed/blocked status, and the route spec asserts downloaded package manifest.final_export_allowed matches audit_pack.export_authorization.final_export_allowed.

run_trace_audit_event_inclusion.evidence: ExportPackage.manifest now includes audit_event_agent_runs, audit_event_tool_calls, audit_event_review_comments, and audit_event_gate_results, and validateExportPackageIntegrity fails if those per-class counts drift from audit_pack.audit_events.

audit_event_manifest_counts.evidence: Focused exportPackage.test coverage asserts the per-class manifest counts and tampers audit_event_tool_calls to verify manifest_counts fails closed on provenance count drift.

source_index_manifest_ref_integrity.evidence: Source-index manifest validation now fails when chunks reference missing documents, source links reference missing documents, or source links reference missing chunks; validateExportPackageIntegrity surfaces failed source-index manifest validation as source_index_manifest_validation.

final_export_fail_closed.evidence: This cycle did not alter Gate Engine canExportFinal behavior or final_memos filtering; final work remains constrained to approved memo records with passed gate status and backend approval policy.

supabase_readiness.evidence: Source-index manifest labels local storage as local_only and appends the explicit limitation that Supabase V1 document, chunk, and source-link listing remains unavailable.

blockers: Supabase V1 document/chunk/source-link listing remains unavailable.
Source-index export consumption is wired in RemoteMatterCommandCenter for local mode, but no backend export route or Supabase source-index implementation exists.
No legal advice generation, external-provider readiness, or Supabase runtime persistence was implemented.
next_actions: Run the AgentOps route Playwright smoke when the seeded UI smoke environment is available to verify the downloaded package includes source_index_manifest, export_authorization, audit-event class manifest counts, and source-index manifest validation end to end.
Consider a backend export route only after local UI export behavior is accepted; keep Supabase source-index unsupported until storage owners implement it.
If another Export/Audit cycle is dispatched, add a focused backend/API audit-pack boundary test only if a backend export route is introduced.
If Supabase source listing remains unavailable for launch, keep private-pilot release notes explicitly local-only.
